en.extract:
Oustalet's sunbird (Cinnyris oustaleti) is a species of bird in the family Nectariniidae.
It is found in Angola, Malawi, Tanzania, and Zambia.

'''Oustalet's sunbird''' ('''''Cinnyris oustaleti''''') is a species of [[bird]] in the family [[Nectariniidae]].
It is found in [[Angola]], [[Malawi]], [[Tanzania]], and [[Zambia]].<ref>{{Cite web|url=https://ebird.org/species/oussun2|title=Oustalet's Sunbird - eBird}}</ref>
[[File:Oustalet-s Sunbird 114ND500 DSC4023.jpg|thumb|Oustalet's Sunbird]]
